commit.message:
8381939

Hi all,

  please review this fix that fixes some verification that has always been broken, but never(?) actually exeucted. With the upcoming JDK-8381413 it will be executed, and after-gc verification will almost always fail during a concurrent start gc.

See the CR description for more detail.

Testing: gha, does not fail with upcoming JDK-8381413 any more

Thanks,
  Thomas
